political.s: No specific PAC or lobbying activity found for Califia Farms. As a privately-held company, the company does not appear in OpenSecrets database. The company maintains a neutral political stance, focusing on plant-based industry advocacy through the Plant Based Foods Association rather than partisan political engagement.

charity.s: Califia Farms demonstrates active charitable engagement. In 2020, pledged one million servings to COVID-19 relief efforts through partnerships with Feeding America and Meals on Wheels. The company sponsors the Whole Kids Foundation and supports food security initiatives, including donations to California Association of Food Banks.
charity.focus: Food security, hunger relief, nutrition education

environment.s: Califia Farms demonstrates strong environmental commitment with major achievements including transition to 100% recycled plastic (rPET) bottles reducing emissions by 19% and energy use by half. The company maintains renewable energy operations, achieved LA Green Business certification, reduced sugar by 40% (2015-2017), and quadrupled organic-certified ingredients in 2024.

labor.s: Califia Farms has established a Supplier Code of Conduct prohibiting forced labor, child labor, and excessive working hours, based on Ethical Trade Initiative standards and ILO principles. The company maintains a sustainability steering committee overseeing labor practices. Limited public data on OSHA violations or specific wage metrics.

dei.s: No specific DEI initiatives or reports found in public sources. The company does not appear to have published formal DEI commitments or diversity metrics. Focus remains on product-level sustainability rather than organizational diversity initiatives.

animals.s: Califia Farms produces exclusively plant-based, dairy-free products that replace animal dairy. The company demonstrates commitment to animal welfare through plant-based advocacy and promotes reduced environmental impact compared to animal agriculture.

guns.s: Not applicable. Califia Farms is a plant-based beverage company with no connection to firearms or weapons manufacturing.

privacy.s: Califia Farms collects personal data including email, name, address, and optional demographic information through website sign-ups and feedback panels. The company shares data with third-party vendors for analytics and advertising. Privacy policies exist for multiple regions but practices allow targeted advertising and data sharing.

execPay.s: No public information available on executive compensation or CEO-to-worker pay ratios. As a private company, Califia Farms does not disclose executive pay data.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
